block_01: A few months back, we informed you that due to the regulatory requirements IQ Option is allowed to provide services to residents of the Czech Republic on a temporary basis only and the residents of the Czech Republic will have their trading accounts closed after a period of six months after registration. After evaluating the options, the company has decided to close the remaining accounts of the Czech Republic residents on January 29, 2021, and to stop accepting new traders from the Czech Republic on the same date. Regrettably, this means that we will no longer be able to accept traffic from this country.
block_02: As an alternative to traffic from the Czech Republic, we suggest you funnel your affiliate effort to other geos from our recommended countries' list.
block_04: On January 29, 2021, we will start redirecting Czech affiliate traffic to the backlink — you can
block_06: . Please make sure to apply the necessary changes to your ad campaigns and reviews before long. Rewrite the reviews targeting the Czech audience to adjust them for new geos and visit our Promo section for fresh landing pages and banners.
